title: phlox × pyramidalis
intro: Phlox × pyramidalis, also known as pyramidal phlox, is a hybrid flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of pyramidal phlox include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Pyramidal phlox can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
